title: ZURU Unicorn Squad, 5 Surprise, Color Changing Magic, 13 to Collect, Accessories and Slime, Style Your Squad, Layers of Surprise, Ages 13+, Toys
features: Color Changing Magic: Take your Unicorn for a dip in cold water to discover their color changing powers!
Accessories and Slime: Check out your Unicorns unique accessories and style as well as super stretchy slime!
13 to Collect: There are 13 magical Color Change Unicorns to discover. Will you find the ultra rare Unicorn with silver glitter hair?
Style Your Squad: Style your unicorn with their accessories to make them shine, or mix it up and swap the interchangeable accessories with the whole squad!
Layers of Surprise: Combine the excitement of unboxing multiple layers with the sassiest unicorns in the game!
description: Product Description Unwrap peel and reveal all new Magic Color Change Unicorn Squad! Take your Unicorn for a dip to see their magical color changing powers. There are 13 Unicorns to collect, each complete with a unique look and fun accessories. Use the comb to brush their long locks, dress them in their cool fashion accessories and play with the Unicorn slime. Will you find Deeva the ultra rare Color Change Unicorn with silver glitter hair? Discover a world of magical Color Change Unicorns with 5 Surprise Unicorn Squad! Safety Warning CHOKING HAZARD-Small parts Not for children under 3 years

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Promote creative role play and storytelling as well as introduction to basic scientific concepts
